_README: TEMPLATE for docs/nav-manifest.json — the durable FRONTIER STATE owned by /app-cartograph.
This file is the source of truth for the live walk, NOT the agent's context. It makes the walk
resumable (re-run /app-cartograph → it reads this and continues from the first unvisited surface)
and write-safe. Seeded from flow-census (the code = the completeness denominator), then burned
down by the nav-cartographer walk. Coverage = visited / discoverable, per role.
JSON has no comments — field meanings are documented in _legend below; delete _README/_legend in
the real file, or keep them, they're ignored by tooling.

_legend.surface.status: unvisited | visited | blocked | unreachable | redirect | skipped
_legend.surface.source: code (seeded by flow-census) | discovered (found during the walk)
_legend.surface.rw: R (reads only) | W (exposes a create/mutate/delete) — default W when unsure
_legend.surface.roles.<role>: visible | gated | redirect(<where>) | notfound | error | unknown
_legend.surface.purpose_source: auto (agent confident, review at GATE B) | human (blessed) | ambiguous (ask at GATE A) | unset
_legend.surface.api_calls[].rw: R | W   — distilled + SECRET-REDACTED; never raw HAR / tokens / bodies
_legend.surface.writes_at: specific write actions present on this surface (gated; never auto-executed)
_legend.walk: OPTIONAL, set by /learn-app: 'none (code-only run)' when no live walk happened — surfaces stay 'unvisited' by design, not by failure. Omit for a normal walked run.
_legend.api_only_mapping: OPTIONAL, set by /learn-app on headless API repos: for a METHOD /path surface with no UI, nav_path is null, screenshot/example_url omitted, and roles.<role> carries the middleware/guard gate (gated|public) instead of visible/redirect. Record here that the app is API-shaped.

seeded_at_commit: <git sha of the target repo when seeded>

surfaces.purpose: Shows a single product with price + add-to-cart so a buyer can evaluate and start an order.
surfaces.notes: Price hidden for anonymous when showPricePublic=false (admin-controlled).

flows: Place an order (WRITE — gated, walked up to submit only)
surfaces.purpose: Final review + order placement from the cart.
surfaces.notes: GATE W: walked up to Place order; not executed (live/UAT target).
Found via Account nav during walk; not yet visited.

open_questions: <business rule the walk couldn't resolve — e.g. 'min search length?', 'who may invite users?'>

redaction.note: Bearer/JWT/Authorization/cookies/bodies stripped at capture; manifest + docs grep-checked clean.
